title: Chaos Demon adds 3 Atk Dice Rolls for battle

card.rawText: During your turn, this card may add +3 Atk Dice Rolls for this battle. If this effect is used and it fails to kill the targeted creature, this creature receives 1/2 the damage it dealt.

effect.value: During your turn, this card may add +3 Atk Dice Rolls for this battle. If this effect is used and it fails to kill the targeted creature, this creature receives 1/2 the damage it dealt.

plan.title: Chaos Demon adds 3 Atk Dice Rolls for battle
plan.summary: Activate Chaos Demon and verify the +3 attack dice branch is represented in battle.

notes: Read text first: During your turn, this card may add +3 Atk Dice Rolls for this battle. If this effect is used and it fails to kill the targeted creature, this creature receives 1/2 the damage it dealt.

steps: Activate Chaos Demon during your turn.
